message:
fix: Use libdeflate preprocessor macros to prevent AVX-512 compilation on old Intel CPUs

Problem: GitHub's Intel macOS CI runners lack AVX-512 support (evex512), causing
libdeflate compilation to fail with "_mm512_*" intrinsic errors.

Solution: Use libdeflate's built-in preprocessor guards:
- LIBDEFLATE_ASSEMBLER_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_VPCLMULQDQ
- LIBDEFLATE_ASSEMBLER_DOES_NOT_SUPPORT_AVX512VNNI

These macros prevent compilation of AVX-512 code paths (adler32_impl.h:75)
while still allowing runtime CPU detection to choose the best available
implementation (AVX2, SSE, etc).

Only applied on x86/x86_64. ARM64 builds are unaffected.

Replaced `-mno-evex512` compiler flag (which wasn't working) with proper
preprocessor macros that libdeflate checks internally.
